"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.webSocket = void 0; var WebSocketSubject_1 = require("./WebSocketSubject"); function webSocket(urlConfigOrSource) { return new WebSocketSubject_1.WebSocketSubject(urlConfigOrSource); } exports.webSocket = webSocket; //# sourceMappingURL=webSocket.js.map
